response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (37%) is below our minimum sharing threshold (60%), and grid islanding with local stress means we must preserve reserves for critical loads; geographic fallback will route your request to less-constrained neighbors.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your latest belief: Islanded grid in local energy crisis; SoC 37% with 1 kW load. Neighbors also stressed (SoC 35–49%). Accepting inbound offers but minimizing outbound shares until SoC recovers above 60%. Geographic round-robin fallback active..
